subject: Add new committer - Jozsef Csongvai
commit_message:
Add new committer - Jozsef Csongvai

Add Jozsef Csongvai as committer

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3613
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I8f3cdee55e5c45ec1e83b6f832bb75562a57fb64

entries.message:
